lines.speaker: Ezekial Lovecraft
lines.text: Well hello there; welcome to our little village. Pray, stay awhile.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know, you sound just like the mayor?

lines.speaker: Ezekial Lovecraft
lines.text: Really? That's the nicest thing anyone has ever said.

lines.speaker: Ezekial Lovecraft
lines.text: I admire him a great deal. He works so hard for this town.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You look like him as well?

lines.speaker: Ezekial Lovecraft
lines.text: Hmm, I don't think I do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No really, what with the unhealthy skin tone and bulging eyes. The resemblance is uncanny.

lines.speaker: Ezekial Lovecraft
lines.text: Well, I haven't spoken to him in a while. I don't get out much.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can see why.

lines.speaker: Ezekial Lovecraft
lines.text: Maybe the Mayor has finally seen how much I admire him and has grown to admire me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything's possible I suppose. Wait a minute, you mean you've always looked that odd?

lines.speaker: Ezekial Lovecraft
lines.text: Hey, I resent that!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, it's just... Nevermind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Ezekial Lovecraft
lines.text: I supply the local fishermen with the tools and bait they need to do their job.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting. Have you been doing it long?

lines.speaker: Ezekial Lovecraft
lines.text: Why yes, all of my life. I took over from my father, who inherited the business from his father and so on.

lines.speaker: Ezekial Lovecraft
lines.text: In fact, there have been Lovecraft's selling bait for over ten generations.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, that's some lineage.

lines.speaker: Ezekial Lovecraft
lines.text: Oh yes, we have a long and interesting family history. For one reason or another the Lovecraft's have always been bait sellers or writers.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, yes well. I'm sure it's all fascinating, but I...

lines.speaker: Ezekial Lovecraft
lines.text: Oh very, very fascinating, for instance my great grandfather Howard...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yawn. Oh, I'm sorry but I really must be getting on. I think my giraffe needs feeding.

lines.speaker: Ezekial Lovecraft
lines.text: Your?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Giraffe. Sorry, but he gets cranky without enough sugar. Bye now!

lines.speaker: Ezekial Lovecraft
lines.text: Oh right, goodbye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy some fishing supplies please?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You are a bit too strange for me. Bye.

lines.speaker: Ezekial Lovecraft
lines.text: Sniff. Yes, everyone says that.
